allow: Bash(git commit -m 'chore: foundation — spec, CLAUDE.md, progress/decisions docs, env example *)

Bash(npx --yes shadcn@latest add button card dialog dropdown-menu input label select sheet table tabs tooltip command popover badge skeleton separator avatar breadcrumb sidebar chart sonner switch checkbox form textarea scroll-area toggle toggle-group alert collapsible kbd empty --yes)
Bash(git commit --quiet -m 'feat: scaffold Next.js 16 with Tailwind v4 and shadcn/ui \(radix, RTL\) *)
Bash(grep -o -E "Farmstead|Revenue & costs|Revenue by category|Top products|Recent transactions|\\\\\\$46,900|Low stock|data-slot=\\"sidebar")
Bash(timeout 30 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:3000 >/dev/null; do sleep 1; done')
Bash(git commit --quiet -m 'feat: shell & design system — 12 AA themes, contrast gate, app shell, demo overview *)
